sentences.text: Was trying to get hold of Leslie sooner.

Let me go ahead and transfer you one moment. Leslie sooner is currently unavailable. Please leave a message after the tone. When you have finished please hang up or press the pound key for more options.

Hello, and thank you for calling Golden Ridge test your call is important to us. So please listen to our new menu options. If you know the name of the person you are trying to reach you can say it at any time for resident relations press or say one for I T help desk press or say two for affordable housing info line, press or say three to leave a message press four for the operator, press or say zero to hear this message again press the star key or say repeat if you know the name of the person you are trying to reach you can say it at any time for resident relations press or say one for I T help desk press or say two for affordable housing info line, press or say three to leave a message press four for the operator, press or say zero to hear this message again press the star key or say repeat, let me transfer you to the operator.
